rules.description: Applicant must be a Filipino citizen enrolled in the Philippines.

cites.quote: The applicant must be a Filipino citizen enrolled in the Philippines.

rules.description: Applicant must be enrolled in a CHED-recognized higher education institution.

cites.quote: The applicant must be currently enrolled in a CHED-recognized higher education institution.

rules.remediation: Enroll in a CHED-recognized institution and provide proof of enrollment.

rules.description: Annual household income must not exceed PHP 700,000.

cites.quote: The applicant's total annual household income must not exceed PHP 700,000.

rules.remediation: Household income exceeds the PHP 700,000 cap for this grant.

rules.description: Applicant must have a GWA of at least 80/100.

cites.quote: The applicant must maintain a General Weighted Average (GWA) of at least 80 out of

rules.remediation: Raise GWA to at least 80 and clear any failing grade.
